steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank must show possession: the "compelling narrative" belongs to the singular noun "the epic poem Raghuvaṃá¸á³ á¸á³§a." A singular possessive pronoun with no verb is needed.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — they're: contraction of "they are" — introduces a verb where only possession is needed. ✗
  • Choice B — its: singular possessive pronoun — correctly shows the narrative belongs to the singular poem. ✓
  • Choice C — their: plural possessive — wrong because the poem is singular. ✗
  • Choice D — it's: contraction of "it is" — introduces a verb where only possession is needed. ✗
B is correct.
